cells.rationale: Rewrites the binding selector policy contract plus guidance-check coercion with a silent-drop failure that still passes gates, so a wrong abstraction propagates to every future selection.
Schema migration with SCHEMA_VERSION/Python-whitelist pairing plus a must-never-throw deterministic reducer fold is squarely the schema/wire work the policy reserves for opus at xhigh.
Bounded Size-S surface in a known pattern, but the status/needs_human envelope is a wire contract with a subtle closed-epic visibility requirement warranting opus.
Largest surface: a hash-snapshotted dataset schema that must survive future re-selects, a new auditor subagent, and a validating submit verb — contract-shaped and high blast radius.

Single-file skill prose but the degrade-never-block posture and pre-finalize phase ordering are correctness-sensitive orchestration where a copy-paste of the blocking posture would violate the directive.
Forward-facing docs consolidation of README plus problem-code rows gated by lint — bounded, well-specified, low blast radius, a clean sonnet fit.
